items.label: Ottoman Empire
items.hint: Ruled from Istanbul, it bridged Europe and Asia for six centuries.

items.label: Mughal Empire
items.hint: Ruled from Delhi and Agra, it built the Taj Mahal.

items.label: Qing Dynasty
items.hint: China's last imperial dynasty, ruled from Beijing.

items.label: Khmer Empire
items.hint: Centered on Angkor, in modern Cambodia.

items.label: Imperial Japan
items.hint: An island nation with an imperial line stretching back over a thousand years.
